_comment: Single source of truth for worker + runtime capability checks. Consumed by orchestrator.mjs detectWorkers() and pforge.ps1 Invoke-Smith Runtime & Worker Readiness section. See issue #28 for the silent-failure mode this prevents.

gh-copilot.description: GitHub Copilot CLI (primary worker). Probes the standalone `copilot` binary first; falls back to the legacy `gh copilot` extension for older installs.

probe.capabilityDescription: Non-interactive prompt mode with --prompt and --allow-all (env: COPILOT_ALLOW_ALL)

fallback.capabilityDescription: Legacy gh copilot extension agentic mode

failureModes: Standalone `copilot` CLI unavailable AND `gh` < 2.88 — both probe targets miss; install one.

VS Code Copilot Chat extension installs an empty `copilot.bat` shim on Windows, which breaks `gh copilot` invocations with `%1 is not a valid Win32 application`. probeWorker() now disambiguates this case (issue #159) and points at the bad shim instead of saying 'not found'.
Standalone `copilot` not authenticated — run `copilot` interactively once and `/login`, or set `COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN` / `GH_TOKEN` (issue #155).

copilot-coding-agent.description: GitHub Copilot Coding Agent (cloud worker — creates Issues, polls for PRs)

probe.capabilityDescription: Authenticated gh CLI with Copilot Coding Agent access

install.windows: winget upgrade --id GitHub.cli && gh auth login
install.macos: brew upgrade gh && gh auth login
install.linux: Upgrade gh via your package manager, then gh auth login

failureModes: gh auth status fails — run 'gh auth login' first.
Repo is not GitHub-hosted — copilot-coding-agent requires a GitHub remote.
Copilot Coding Agent never opens a PR within the polling timeout (default 30 min) — slice marked failed.

grok.description: xAI Grok Build CLI (agentic coding worker). Headless via `grok -p <prompt> --output-format streaming-json`. Dual auth: browser login on a SuperGrok / X Premium+ subscription (flat billing) or XAI_API_KEY (metered API). Default model grok-4.5.

probe.capabilityDescription: Headless prompt mode with -p and --output-format streaming-json

failureModes: grok CLI not authenticated — launch `grok` once and sign in (SuperGrok / X Premium+), or set XAI_API_KEY for headless/metered use.

Very large slice prompts passed inline via -p may exceed the OS command-line length limit; if observed, switch the invocation to Grok Build's file-input syntax once confirmed (see Phase GROK-BUILD-WORKER Slice 3 fixture capture).

gh.description: GitHub CLI (required for PR/branch-protection flows; v2.88+ required for Copilot CLI worker)
failureModes: gh < 2.88 ships legacy gh-copilot extension v1.2.x (suggest/explain only) — run-plan slices will silently succeed with zero code changes.

install.linux: Install via package manager or nvm

pwsh.description: PowerShell 7.x (recommended for cross-platform; pforge.ps1 targets 5.1+ but 7+ is the supported baseline)

packageManagers._comment: Detected at runtime to pick the right install hint. First found wins per OS.

innerLoop._comment: Inner-loop subsystem capability flags. Advertised via forge_capabilities so MCP consumers + agent adapters can auto-discover feature availability on this node. See INNER_LOOP_SURFACE in capabilities.mjs for the full schema. Phase-25 (v2.57) shipped the first 7; Phase-26 (v2.58) added competitive/autoFix/costAnomaly.
